query: Mara cross country ski race Sils im Engadin to S-chanf

videos.title: 1.4.14 Nordic Ski Race Apple Valley, MN
A No-Name (yet) Dolomites Ski Tour… Following the Maratona dles Dolomites on Skis
videos.description:
Finally back with a new adventure: a new ski tour across the Dolomiti Superski area that still needs a name — as you can see from the title.

The idea was simple: follow on skis the route of the Maratona dles Dolomites, touching all the famous passes that cyclists ride in summer.

We tested it for you and we can absolutely say that it’s a ski tour worth trying if you come to Alta Badia for skiing in winter.

Now we need your help: what name would you give to this ski tour?
Let me know your ideas in the comments below.

The skitour on STRAVA:
https://www.strava.com/activities/17636759180

videos.title: Donzallaz et Danuser remportent une dantesque 45e Mara
videos.description: Le fondeur suisse de Bad Ragaz Marius Danuser et la suissesse de Rossignol Nicole Donzallaz ont remporté dimanche 1er mars le marathon classique de la Mara dans des conditions météo terribles.
